Id1.text: The operator of AIDAstella is German-based AIDA Cruises. The AIDAstella is owned by Costa Crociere.

Id2.text: The AIDAstella is owned by Costa Crociere and its operator is German-based AIDA Cruises.

Id3.text: AIDA Cruises are based in Germany and owned by Costa Crociere. They operate the AIDAstella.
